items.title: The 70/30 rule that separates millionaires from everyone else
items.description: "Sexy is how you go broke," David Bach argues, saying millionaires know something others don't: Boring is the real sexy.

items.title: Google Gemini boss describes working with founders Larry Page and Sergey Brin to win the AI future
items.description: Demis Hassabis told Fortune it's a return to the "shipping culture" from "the golden era of Google."

items.title: Why 50% stay broke and how one hour a day can change everything
items.description: Next time you go to work, David Bach says, try paying yourself first.

items.title: HPE turns finance into the front line of enterprise AI
items.description: HPE’s AI named Alfred is shrinking reporting cycles and rewriting the CFO playbook.
